title: Degraded mode — govulncheck not installed, partial audit only
code_snippet:
# govulncheck -version -> command not found
# go.mod exists and is valid
# go mod verify -> all modules verified
expected_feedback: Degraded: Partial mode — govulncheck unavailable. Can deliver license check, outdated dependency report, module hygiene review, and supply chain posture. Cannot deliver CVE scan results or make vulnerability claims. Must NOT claim 'no vulnerabilities' without govulncheck. Install: go install golang.org/x/vuln/cmd/govulncheck@latest
